content.text:
All tests pass. Let me provide a summary of the fix.

## Summary

The bug was that `stdinIsATTY` was only available as a template function during `chezmoi init` (in init templates), but not in regular templates.

**Root Cause:** In `/testbed/internal/cmd/config.go`, the `stdinIsATTY` template function was only registered in the `initTemplateFuncs` map (line 952), which is only merged with `c.templateFuncs` during init template processing. The regular template functions map (built at lines 484-581) did not include it.

**Fix:** Added `"stdinIsATTY": c.stdinIsATTYInitTemplateFunc` to the regular template functions map in `config.go`. This makes `stdinIsATTY` available to all templates, not just init templates.

The change is minimal - a single line addition to the template functions map, alphabetically sorted after `"stat"` and before `"toIni"`.
